items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific feature 'Signature on documents (work order, delivery receipt, contract)', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for signatures on documents, yet it lacks concrete API reads or persisted state checks to confirm its implementation. Therefore, the evidence is inconclusive regarding whether this requirement is satisfied.
